name: Stranger Things
description: When a young boy disappears, a group of friends uncover supernatural mysteries and secret government experiments in their small town.

name: Lovely Runner
description: Lovely Runner follows Im Sol, a devoted fan who is heartbroken by the tragic death of her favorite star, Ryu Sun-jae, a former swimmer turned K-pop idol.

name: Wednesday
description: Wednesday Addams investigates a murder mystery while navigating life at Nevermore Academy.

name: Money Heist
description: A criminal mastermind known as The Professor recruits a team of robbers for the biggest heist in history.

name: The Witcher
description: Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter, struggles to find his place in a world where humans are often more wicked than beasts.

name: All of Us Are Dead
description: A zombie virus outbreak traps high school students who must fight to survive and escape.
